evals.name: python-data-processor
evals.prompt: Aplica refactorización energética al código en evals/files/sample-python/data_processor.py usando el análisis JSON en evals/files/sample-python/analysis.json. Necesito el código refactorizado y un reporte de cambios.
evals.expected_output: Refactored Python code file + structured JSON report with all changes applied
expectations: The O(n²) nested loop in process_records is refactored to use a dict-based lookup (O(n))
String concatenation with += inside process_records is replaced with list append + ''.join()
File open/close is moved outside the loop in export_report (open once before loop)
f.readlines() in load_data is replaced with direct file iteration (for line in f:)
All original function signatures are preserved
The output includes a structured JSON with a changes_applied array
The output includes a unified diff/patch showing all changes
The output includes verification results (static_analysis field)
No new functions or features are introduced

evals.name: javascript-user-service
evals.prompt: Refactoriza por eficiencia energética el código en evals/files/sample-javascript/user_service.js según el análisis en evals/files/sample-javascript/analysis.json. Devuelve el código modificado y el reporte JSON con los cambios.
evals.expected_output: Refactored JavaScript code file + structured JSON report with all changes applied
expectations: The sequential fetch loop in getUsersWithOrders is replaced with Promise.all for parallel requests
fs.readFileSync in loadConfig is replaced with fs.promises.readFile (async)
JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(obj)) in deepClone is replaced with structuredClone(obj)
String concatenation with += in logBatch is replaced with array push + join('')
All original function signatures are preserved
The output includes a changes_applied array with before/after snippets
The output includes a unified diff/patch
No new functionality is introduced

evals.name: java-order-processor
evals.prompt: Aplica las optimizaciones energéticas del análisis JSON al código Java en evals/files/sample-java/OrderProcessor.java. El análisis está en evals/files/sample-java/analysis.json. Dame el código refactorizado y el reporte detallado.
evals.expected_output: Refactored Java code file + structured JSON report with all changes applied
expectations: The N+1 query loop in processOrders is replaced with a batch query (IN clause)
String concatenation with += in processOrders is replaced with StringBuilder or parameterized query
The byte-by-byte file read in readConfig is replaced with BufferedReader or readAllBytes
String concatenation with += in readConfig is replaced with StringBuilder
The O(n²) nested loop in findDuplicates is replaced with HashSet-based O(n) approach
All original function signatures are preserved
The output includes a changes_applied array and a unified diff
The output includes verification results
No new functionality is introduced
